cairo.headline:
Where history meets
modern elegance
cairo.sub: Steps away from the pyramids, in the heart of timeless luxury.

hurghada.headline:
Blue waters,
endless calm
hurghada.sub: Private beach villas kissed by the Red Sea breeze.

alex.headline:
Mediterranean soul,
elevated living
alex.sub: Where sea breeze carries centuries of stories.

search.title: Plan your perfect stay
search.subtitle: Search destinations, choose your dates, and discover the best hotels for you.

locations.title: Our Hotels
locations.subtitle: Three iconic destinations with one consistent standard of comfort, design, and service.

cairo.name: Cairo
cairo.desc: Luxury in the heart of the historic capital with skyline views and curated city experiences.

sharm.name: Sharm El Sheikh
sharm.desc: A refined coastal escape for divers, families, and sun seekers.

hurghada.name: Hurghada
hurghada.desc: Wake up to turquoise waters, private beaches, and peaceful resort living.

featured.title: Featured Stays
featured.subtitle: A curated collection of hotels our guests love.

experiences.title: The Full Experience
experiences.subtitle: From wellness to dining to beachfront calm, every moment is thoughtfully designed.

pools.title: Infinity Pools
pools.desc: Relax above the horizon in serene pools made for long afternoons.

spa.title: Exclusive Spa
spa.desc: Recharge with wellness rituals inspired by timeless hospitality.

dining.title: Fine Dining
dining.desc: Enjoy refined menus blending local flavor with elegant presentation.

beach.title: Private Beach
beach.desc: Reserved sands, beach service, and sunsets just for you.

features.title: Designed for refined tastes
features.subtitle: Every detail is built around comfort, trust, and a seamless stay.

luxury.title: Curated Luxury
luxury.desc: Thoughtful room details and premium finishes elevate every night.

booking.title: Flexible Booking
booking.desc: Plans change, so we keep booking simple, flexible, and stress-free.

rate.title: Best Rate Always
rate.desc: Our smart pricing ensures the best available rate every time.

connectivity.title: Seamless Connectivity
connectivity.desc: Reliable Wi-Fi and always-on support at your fingertips.

transfers.title: VIP Transfers
transfers.desc: Private airport transfers for a smooth arrival and departure.

confirmation.title: Instant Confirmation
confirmation.desc: No waiting. Your booking is confirmed instantly.

sarah.name: Sarah Al Rashidi
sarah.text: Our stay in Cairo was flawless from start to finish. Every detail felt intentional.

james.name: James Thornton
james.text: Hurghada gave me the calm I always dreamed of. Truly exceptional.

nadia.name: Nadia Bergman
nadia.text: A perfect mix of adventure and relaxation. I would book it again without hesitation.

cta.subtitle: Book your stay in Cairo, Hurghada, or Sharm and enjoy the experience.
